title: selaginella crinita
intro: Selaginella crinita, also known as the Hairy Spikemoss, is a small, delicate plant species belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella crinita include reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and relieving symptoms of respiratory diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
